\boxed{}
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, none of the studies address the impact of nerve length within the treatment volume on radiosurgical outcomes. All reported findings relate to dose levels, timing of pain relief, patient demographics, and complications rather than variations in anatomical nerve dimension during treatment planning.
